summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GTA RP Tax Portal. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend partially working with authentication session issues affecting some workflows.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session state not persisting correctly - login appears successful but user gets redirected back to login page
Frontend showing 'Please fill out this field' validation error even when fields are filled

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings about HTML structure (spans in tbody elements)

passed_tests: Backend: Patron account creation and login
Frontend: Login page loading and styling
Frontend: Admin login and dashboard access
Frontend: Business creation modal and form
Frontend: Professional GTA-style dark theme design

action_item_for_main_agent.priority_1: Fix frontend authentication session management - users can login but sessions don't persist correctly for patron/employee roles
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_2: Investigate form validation issues causing 'Please fill out this field' errors
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_3: Fix React hydration warnings in admin dashboard table components
